projectDescription: A collection of standardized Agent Skills to teach AI assistants about modern Android development with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
keyFeatures: 16 specialized Agent Skills for modern Android development
Expert guidance on Clean Architecture and Jetpack Compose
Production-ready patterns for ViewModels, State, and Navigation
Comprehensive testing strategies with Roborazzi and Hilt
Performance optimization for Compose and Gradle builds
Kotlin Coroutines expertise with structured concurrency
Compatible with GitHub Copilot, Claude, Gemini, and Cursor
publicApiSurface: android-architecture - Clean Architecture and Hilt DI patterns
compose-ui - Jetpack Compose best practices and state hoisting
android-data-layer - Repository pattern with Room and Retrofit
android-accessibility - WCAG compliance and TalkBack optimization
android-testing - Unit, Hilt, and screenshot testing strategies
kotlin-concurrency-expert - Coroutines debugging and best practices
android-retrofit - Networking with OkHttp and serialization
android-gradle-logic - Convention plugins and version catalogs
xml-to-compose-migration - Migration patterns and component mapping
coil-compose - Image loading with Coil in Compose
